title: Module `ref` ports don't work without module inlining

features.name: ref port declaration in module port list
features.description: Code should include a module declaration with a ref port in its port list
features.snippet: module sub(input bit clk, input int cyc, ref int y);

features.name: ref port bidirectional update without module inlining
features.description: Code should include a ref port connected to a signal that is updated from both parent and submodule contexts with inlining disabled

features.name: module instantiation with ref port argument
features.description: Code should include a submodule instantiation passing a variable to a ref port without inlining
features.snippet:
int x;
sub s(clk, cyc, x);
